samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Implement a traffic light with red, yellow, green indicators and a pedestrian button. In normal traffic light operation, the east-west (EW) light should have a 60-clock cycle period, with 5-clock cycle periods of yellow and 10-clock cycle periods of red. The north-south (NS) light should have a 60-clock cycle period, with 5-clock cycle periods of yellow and 10-clock cycle periods of red. The period of the cycle should be the same for both the EW and NS light, and the period of the cycle is not affected by the pedestrian button. When the pedestrian button is pressed, if the remaining green time for the EW light is greater than 10 clocks, then the green time is shortened to 10 clocks. If the remaining green time for the EW light is less than 10 clocks, then the green time remains unchanged. The east-west and north-south lights are paired, so that when the EW light is green, the NS light is red; when the EW light is yellow, the NS light is red; and when the EW light is red, the NS light is green.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian button.</input>
        <output id="red">Red output signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow output signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green output signal.</output>
        <output id="clock" width_description="[7:0]">An 8-bit output representing the count value of the internal counter.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="idle">Idle state.</enum>
        <enum id="s1_red">State 1 red.</enum>
        <enum id="s2_yellow">State 2 yellow.</enum>
        <enum id="s3_green">State 3 green.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">State.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[7:0]">Cnt.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">P_state.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[0:0]">P_red.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[0:0]">P_yellow.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[0:0]">P_green.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <enum id="idle">Idle state.</enum>
        <enum id="s1_red">State 1 red.</enum>
        <enum id="s2_yellow">State 2 yellow.</enum>
        <enum id="s3_green">State 3 green.</enum>
        <case>
            <case_item id="idle">
                <if condition="state==s1_red">state = s1_red;</if>
            </case_item>
            <case_item id="s1_red">
                <if condition="cnt==3">state = s3_green;</if>
                <else>state = s1_red;</else>
            </case_item>
            <case_item id="s2_yellow">
                <if condition="cnt==3">state = s1_red;</if>
                <else>state = s2_yellow;</else>
            </case_item>
            <case_item id="s3_green">
                <if condition="cnt==3">state = s2_yellow;</if>
                <else>state = s3_green;</else>
            </case_item>
        </case>
        <always_combinational_logic>
            <if condition="!rst_n">cnt = 10;</if>
            <else>
                <if condition="pass_request && green">cnt = 10;</if>
                <else>
                    <if condition="!green && p_green">cnt = 60;</if>
                    <else>
                        <if condition="!yellow && p_yellow">cnt = 5;</if>
                        <else>
                            <if condition="!red && p_red">cnt = 10;</if>
                        </else>
                    </else>
                </else>
            </else>
        </always_combinational_logic>
        <assign width_description="[7:0]" id="clock">cnt;</assign>
        <always_clocked_sequential_logic>
            <if condition="!rst_n">
                <assign id="p_red">0;</assign>
                <assign id="p_yellow">0;</assign>
                <assign id="p_green">0;</assign>
            </assign>
            <else>
                <assign id="p_red">red;</assign>
                <assign id="p_yellow">yellow;</assign>
                <assign id="p_green">green;</assign>
            </else>
        </always_clocked_sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
